name: lead-scout
description: Lead research agent. Finds companies in a given industry whose websites meet specified constraints, extracts contact information, and writes a CSV of leads to the workspace. Uses Firecrawl when available, falls back to web search.

firecrawl_api_key.title: Firecrawl API key
firecrawl_api_key.description: Your Firecrawl API key from firecrawl.dev. Optional — leave blank to use the WebSearch/WebFetch fallback. Stored in the system keychain; never visible to Claude in conversation. Update anytime via plugin settings.
